ai_summary: Rajratan Global Wire Limited (RAJRATAN) has formally notified shareholders and stock exchanges of its upcoming 38th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on July 24, 2026, and the availability of its Integrated Annual Report for FY 2025-26. In adherence to SEBI regulations, the company is communicating the web-link for these documents to shareholders whose email addresses are not registered. This is a standard corporate governance disclosure demonstrating compliance, with no immediate material financial impacts or red flags identified.
